description: Retrieval evaluation set for the sample document corpus (data/sample_docs/). Each item maps a question to the source file(s) that should appear in the retrieved results. Where information legitimately lives in more than one document, multiple acceptable sources are listed; a retrieval counts as a hit if ANY listed source is returned.
